hero.title: Stories That Speak for Themselves
hero.subtitle: Hear from the students, graduates, and families whose lives have been shaped by the AUF experience — in their own words.

featured.quote: AUF didn't just give me a diploma — it gave me the discipline, the confidence, and the network to build a career I'm proud of. The faculty genuinely cared about my growth, not just my grades. I would choose AUF again without hesitation.
featured.name: TBA

stories.title: What AUF Students Are Saying
stories.description: From freshmen finding their footing to graduates launching careers, AUF students share what the university has meant to them.

items.quote: The clinical training at AUF is unmatched. By the time I took the board exams, I felt genuinely prepared because of the real hospital exposure we had from early in the program.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: I chose AUF for Computer Studies and it was the best decision I ever made. The faculty pushed us beyond textbooks — we were building real systems and solving actual problems from sophomore year.
items.name: TBA
items.program: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

items.quote: The bar passers from AUF Law consistently rank among the best. The program is rigorous, yes, but that rigor is exactly what prepares you for a demanding legal career.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: Being a working student while enrolled at AUF was not easy, but the support from my professors and the flexibility of the university made it possible. They really want you to succeed.
items.name: TBA
items.program: Bachelor of Science in Business Administration

items.quote: AUF's Education program gave me a solid foundation as a teacher. The mentorship I received from my professors during student teaching was something I still draw from every day in my own classroom.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: What sets AUF apart is the culture. Students here are competitive but not cutthroat — everyone genuinely helps each other. It made studying for board exams so much less isolating.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: The engineering program challenged me in ways I didn't expect. Thesis projects, lab immersions, site visits — by graduation I had a portfolio that got me hired within a month.
items.name: TBA
items.program: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

items.quote: I was hesitant about choosing a university outside Manila, but AUF changed my entire perspective. The academic quality, the campus, the community — Angeles City became home.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: The AUF Graduate School gave me exactly what I needed as a working professional — rigorous coursework, accessible scheduling, and professors who were not just academics but practitioners.
items.name: TBA

international.title: International Students at AUF
international.description: Students from across Asia, Africa, and beyond have found a home at AUF. Here are some of their stories.

items.quote: Studying medicine in the Philippines was the best choice for my career. The English-medium curriculum, the affordable tuition, and the warmth of Filipino culture made the experience truly enriching.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: AUF gave me a quality education I could not afford back home. More importantly, it gave me confidence — knowing I could compete with students from anywhere in the world.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: The transition was easier than I expected because everyone spoke English and everyone was kind. My professors went out of their way to help me adjust to Filipino academic culture.
items.name: TBA
items.program: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

items.quote: The Buddy Program was a lifesaver. My Filipino buddy introduced me to campus life, helped me find accommodation, and became one of my closest friends throughout my entire stay in the Philippines.
items.name: TBA
items.program: Bachelor of Science in Business Administration

parents.title: What Parents Are Saying
parents.description: For many families, choosing a university for their child is one of the most significant decisions they'll make. Here's what AUF parents have shared.

items.quote: When my daughter told me she wanted to take Medicine at AUF, I researched extensively. What I found — the accreditations, the board exam results, the clinical facilities — convinced me completely. It was the right choice.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: My son initially struggled during his first year. The Guidance Office reached out to us as a family and worked with him. That kind of attention to student wellbeing is rare — and we are deeply grateful for it.
items.name: TBA

items.quote: AUF gave my child more than a degree — it instilled values, discipline, and a sense of purpose. As a parent, that is everything. We are proud AUF alumni by proxy now.
items.name: TBA

stats.title: AUF by the Numbers
stats.description: Behind every testimonial is a track record of consistent excellence. These figures reflect the trust the AUF community has placed in the university — year after year.

cta.heading: Ready to Write Your Own Story?
cta.body: Thousands of Abacans started right where you are now. Take the next step.
